Aries.personality: Bold, energetic, initiator, competitive. Natural-born leaders who thrive on challenges and are always ready to take charge.
Aries.strengths: Leadership, courage, action-oriented, optimism, determination, confidence.
Aries.challenges: Impatient, impulsive, short-tempered, can be overly aggressive.

Taurus.personality: Reliable, grounded, loyal, beauty-loving. Values stability and comfort, with a deep appreciation for the finer things in life.
Taurus.strengths: Patience, practicality, determination, dependability, strong willpower.
Taurus.challenges: Stubbornness, resistance to change, possessiveness, materialistic tendencies.

Gemini.personality: Curious, expressive, adaptable, witty. Quick-thinking communicators who love learning and social interaction.
Gemini.strengths: Communication, creativity, social intelligence, versatility, intellectual agility.

Cancer.personality: Nurturing, intuitive, protective, emotional. Deeply connected to home and family with strong empathic abilities.
Cancer.strengths: Empathy, loyalty, intuition, emotional depth, caregiving nature.
Cancer.challenges: Moodiness, over-sensitivity, clinginess, tendency to hold grudges.

Leo.personality: Confident, dramatic, generous, warm-hearted. Natural performers who radiate charisma and love being in the spotlight.
Leo.challenges: Arrogance, stubbornness, need for constant admiration, domineering nature.

Virgo.personality: Analytical, detail-oriented, practical, helpful. Perfectionists who strive for order and efficiency in all areas of life.
Virgo.strengths: Attention to detail, reliability, analytical thinking, modesty, diligence.
Virgo.challenges: Over-critical, perfectionism, excessive worry, difficulty relaxing.

Libra.personality: Diplomatic, fair-minded, charming, harmonious. Natural peacemakers who value balance, beauty, and partnership.
Libra.strengths: Diplomacy, grace, fairness, social skills, aesthetic sense.
Libra.challenges: Indecisiveness, people-pleasing, avoidance of confrontation, superficiality.

Scorpio.personality: Intense, passionate, resourceful, mysterious. Deeply emotional individuals with powerful intuition and determination.
Scorpio.strengths: Determination, bravery, loyalty, resourcefulness, strategic thinking.
Scorpio.challenges: Jealousy, secrecy, possessiveness, tendency toward manipulation.

Sagittarius.personality: Adventurous, optimistic, freedom-loving, philosophical. Seekers of truth and knowledge who love exploration and travel.
Sagittarius.strengths: Generosity, idealism, great sense of humor, open-mindedness, honesty.
Sagittarius.challenges: Impatience, tactlessness, over-promising, restlessness, commitment issues.

Capricorn.personality: Disciplined, ambitious, responsible, patient. Goal-oriented achievers who value tradition and long-term planning.
Capricorn.strengths: Responsibility, discipline, self-control, good management skills, persistence.
Capricorn.challenges: Pessimism, rigidity, workaholic tendencies, emotional detachment.

Aquarius.personality: Innovative, humanitarian, independent, intellectual. Visionary thinkers who value freedom and progressive ideas.
Aquarius.strengths: Originality, independence, humanitarian spirit, intellectual depth, inventiveness.

Pisces.personality: Compassionate, artistic, intuitive, dreamy. Deeply spiritual souls with a rich inner world and boundless imagination.
Pisces.strengths: Compassion, artistic talent, intuition, gentleness, wisdom, empathy.
Pisces.challenges: Escapism, over-sensitivity, indecisiveness, tendency toward self-pity.
